title: Food scramble and sort - Canada.ca
content:
Canada's food guide kids

## Food scramble and sort
Sort these foods into the following groups: vegetables and fruits, whole grain foods, and protein foods.
Broccoli is a vegetable
A radish is a vegetable
Cabbage is a vegetable
Whole wheat bread is a whole grain food
Kidney beans are a protein food
A carrot is a vegetable
A mushroom is a vegetable
Green peas are a vegetable
Brown rice is a whole grain food
Lentils are a protein food
A tomato is a vegetable
A strawberry is a fruit
Watermelon is a fruit
whole grain spaghetti
Whole grain spaghetti is a whole grain food
Cantaloupe is a fruit
Spinach is a vegetable
A blueberry is a fruit
Pumpkin is a vegetable
Barley is a whole grain food
Light tuna is a protein food
Squash is a vegetable
Celery is a vegetable
whole grain pita bread
Whole grain pita bread is a whole grain food
Chicken is a protein food
Turkey is a protein food
A potato is a vegetable
A snow pea is a vegetable
Bulgur is a whole grain food
Trout is a protein food
Nut butter is a protein food
A cucumber is a vegetable
An onion is a vegetable
Zucchini is a vegetable
Wild rice is a whole grain food
Walnuts are a protein food
Milk is a protein food
Cauliflower is a vegetable
Asparagus is a vegetable
An orange is a fruit
Oatmeal is a whole grain food
Almonds are a protein food
Wild game is a protein food
A sweet potato is a vegetable
Honeydew melon is a fruit
whole grain crackers
Whole grain crackers are a whole grain food
Chickpeas are a protein food
Split peas are a protein food
A raspberry is a fruit
Pineapple is a fruit
Whole grain penne is a whole grain food
Peanuts are a protein food
Cashews are a protein food
Bok choy is a vegetable
A blackberry is a fruit
whole grain tortillas
Whole grain tortillas are a whole grain food
Tofu is a protein food
Cottage cheese is a protein food
Lettuce is a vegetable
Whole grain cereal is a whole grain food
Plain yogurt is a protein food
An eggplant is a vegetable
Quinoa is a whole grain food
Eggs are a protein food
Soybeans are a protein food
Bell peppers are a vegetable
Pork chops are a protein food
Sunflower seeds are a protein food
A beet is a vegetable
Think of other foods to explore and how they can be sorted into the following groups: vegetables and fruits, whole grain foods, and protein foods.
- whole grain crackers
- whole grain pita bread
- whole grain spaghetti
- whole grain tortilla
